name: Mei&Lin | Harpies
description:
Harpies hide from the Humans deep in the forest, out of sight and living their quiet lives. But the Humans don't really want to leave the Harpies alone. Harpies have a beautiful voice, their feathers are colorful, and their light bodies are comfortable enough for... well, comfortable, let's say.

And so, one dark night on the edge of the forest, your camp is set up for the night.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Well, the bot had some obvious hallucinations during the test: the girls sometimes exchange the color of their feathers, eyes and breasts. But, it's not my fault...
creator: PavPav
